brand.name: fr_noah
brand.subtitle: Premium Roblox development focused on polished gameplay, scalable systems, and memorable experiences that feel clean from the first click to the final loop. Computer science major with a long-term focus on game development.

contact.title: Let’s build something worth remembering.
contact.intro: Need systems, gameplay, UI, technical direction, or full Roblox development support. Reach out through any channel below or use the form.

form.placeholderNote: Replace the placeholder endpoint in site-data.json to make this form live.
form.readyNote: This form is connected and ready to receive submissions.

projects.title: Benchpress Simulator
projects.description: A high-retention Roblox simulator built around strength progression, boss fights, and a satisfying core gameplay loop. Designed to keep progression clear, rewarding, and easy to come back to. Reached over 4 million visits

projects.title: Bottom Games
projects.description: A polished chance-based Roblox experience with strong presentation, clean interface design, and a focused gameplay loop built for the niche it targeted.

projects.title: Shark Game
projects.description: A Roblox survival project inspired by Squid Game. I worked as one of two scripters, helping build core gameplay logic and improve the overall playability of the experience before release plans changed.

projects.title: Fish a Brainrot
projects.description: Commission project where I worked on rod behavior, fishing mechanics, and general gameplay improvements to help make the experience feel complete and playable.

media.alt: Fish a Brainrot gameplay clip one
Fish a Brainrot gameplay clip two

projects.title: Blade Simulator
projects.description: A smaller commission project where I contributed interface work and supporting gameplay scripting to help improve both presentation and usability.

projects.title: Box Pickup
projects.description: A smaller commission project where I built a box pickup and drop-off system, focusing on clear interaction flow and reliable gameplay behavior.

projects.title: Coffee Machine
projects.description: A smaller commission project where I worked on a coffee machine and creamer system, helping make the interaction feel clean, functional, and polished in-game.

projects.title: WorldBox
projects.description: A sandbox-style commission project where I worked on grid-based item placement and world interaction systems. Even though the project did not move forward, it was a strong showcase of my scripting ability in placement logic and world-building tools.

projects.title: Alien Invasion
projects.description: A small personal project I started independently to stay sharp and experiment with gameplay ideas. While it was never meant to be a major release, it shows solid scripting fundamentals and clean implementation.

projects.title: Murder Mystery 3
projects.description: My first serious Roblox project, built as the owner and sole developer. I grew it to 1.6 million visits, making it an important early milestone in both my technical growth and understanding of live game development.
